description: 100% cotton (180 gsm) Crew neck half sleeves t-shirt This t-shirt features the Old football and establishment year of fifa 1904 with the address: 229 RUE St.Honore, Paris.Cool, casual and comfy, t-shirts are perhaps the best thing invented in clothing. Slipping into a T-shirt and getting started is always a breeze. It's the perennial all-occasion outfit that remains a favourite with one and all. Parties, get-togethers, Friday dressing or simply a walk in the park, t-shirts are an ideal Fit for any occasion. The appeal of T-shirts only gets more as they are available in lots of colours, various fits and sizes. So all it takes is the desire to wear a T-shirt and one would be spoilt for choice pretty soon. Stuff up the wardrobe or stack up your room with T-shirts that suit your style and taste. Go on and join the ever growing fan club for T-shirts.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in T-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5"
